Find Us

Our Office in Arusha

We’re based in the safari capital of Tanzania — the gateway to Serengeti, Ngorongoro, Tarangire, and beyond.

📍 Jacaranda Street, Arusha 23100, Tanzania
🕐 Monday – Saturday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Sunday: By appointment
✈️ 20 min from Kilimanjaro International Airport (JRO)
10 min from Arusha Airport (ARK)

Hoza Tanzania Safaris is your trusted local partner for unforgettable adventures across Tanzania’s most breathtaking landscapes. Whether you dream of witnessing the Great Migration in the Serengeti, exploring the stunning Ngorongoro Crater, trekking the majestic Mount Kilimanjaro, or relaxing on the pristine beaches of Zanzibar, we tailor every journey to your preferences. With experienced guides, well-maintained vehicles, and a deep commitment to responsible tourism, we ensure your safari is safe, comfortable, and truly authentic. Let us show you the heart of Africa — Karibu Tanzania (Welcome to Tanzania)!

© 2026 Hozatanzaniasafaris. All rights reserved.
